name: the SARIF bus reports green and exit 0 when no tool produced a blocking result
command:
printf '# Clean

## Decision

Use Postgres.
' > c.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/prose-judge.sh" --rule g-aws-no-unrestricted-ingress --root . --paths c.md --json > c.sarif 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/sarif-aggregate.sh" --in c.sarif 2>&1 | grep -q 'status=green'
